text:
do you understand what’s happening to content creation right now?

→ someone created a TikTok account on March 13th (a week ago). posted AI generated Love Island themed episodes starring fruit characters.

→ 9 days later… 3.1 million followers. 21.3 million likes. daily

btw the 
@cognition
 growth formula is very simple:

Devin growth = cloud komputer * koding agents growth

math it out. working on releasing some numbers soon
